SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-17-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. 506 PLAINTIFF AARON BRODERICK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANOTHER PLANET ENTERTAINMENT LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MOLLY ZIDOW, REPRESENTATIVE. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. DEFENDANT DECLARES TRUE BUSINESS ENTITY NAME OSL WINDMILLS, LLC. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRODERICK, AARON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OSL WINDMILLS, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
